## 海外移动游戏市场新品收入占比

message.content:
This section addresses the revenue share of newly released mobile games in overseas markets. It is structured to support retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topic & Metric:** The proportion or percentage of total overseas mobile game revenue generated by new product releases.
- **Entities:** Overseas/international mobile game markets, newly launched mobile games.
- **Evidence & Format:** Likely contains quantitative metrics, statistical tables, or charts illustrating revenue distribution by product age/release status.
- **Answerable Questions:** What percentage of overseas mobile game revenue comes from new releases? How significant is the revenue contribution of new products in the international mobile gaming sector?
*(Note: The provided excerpt contains only the section heading; specific numerical values, dates, definitions, or detailed analytical claims are not present in the text.)*
